waloop.name: Waloop

metadata.title: Waloop — Credit Card Billing & Payment Tracker
metadata.description: Waloop is a personal finance app for managing credit card billing cycles and payment due dates. Track cards, get reminders, and find the best days to buy.

page.purpose: Waloop is a personal finance app that helps you manage credit cards. It tracks billing cycles and payment due dates for every card, sends timely reminders before deadlines, and shows a timeline of upcoming due dates. Enter your pay date and Waloop recommends the best days to pay and to make purchases based on each card's billing cycle. You can organize cards for yourself or your entire household — all in one place.
page.featuresTitle: What you can do with Waloop

waloop.description: Lenara Labs' first in-house product — a personal finance app for managing credit cards. Organize cards and household members, track billing cycles and payment due dates, get timely reminders, see a timeline of upcoming due dates, and discover the best days to buy based on each card's cycle. Enter your pay date and Waloop recommends the optimal payment and purchase days for every card.
subtitles: Never miss a billing or payment date again
Best days to buy — tailored to your cycle
All your cards and household members in one place
Smart notifications when it actually matters
Enter your pay date — we optimize the rest

times2u.name: Times2U
times2u.description: Import schedules from Excel files, screenshots or photos — or build them manually in the app. What sets Times2U apart is an AI assistant that works like your personal secretary: tell it you have a meeting on Wednesday and it lands on your calendar, ask which days you're free, request a routine and your schedule adapts. Everything revolves around smarter time management.
subtitles: Tell your assistant about a meeting — it's on your calendar
Import schedules from Excel, screenshots or photos
Ask which days you have free
Need a routine? Your schedule adapts instantly
Your time, managed like a personal secretary
